mcp__filesystem.description: Handles file system operations like reading and writing project files.

mcp__shell.description: Executes shell commands including package managers (npm, pip, cargo).

mcp__git.description: Manages version control operations (init, commit, push).

mcp__testing.description: Runs test suites using jest, pytest, playwright, etc.

mcp__deploy.description: Handles deployment to various platforms (vercel, fly, docker-swarm).

mcp__generators.description: Custom generators for scaffolding applications, creating schemas, etc.

mcp__permissions.description: Manages security and approval workflows for tool operations.
